title: Discover the power of monday AI ( USA + EU timezones)
excerpt:
Learn all about our soon-to-be-released AI capabilities! join us for another LIVE community event with monday AI product managers Or Fridman and Vlad Mystetskyi.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Learn all about our soon-to-be-released AI capabilities! join us for another LIVE community event with monday AI product managers Or Fridman and Vlad Mystetskyi.

This event will be happening in two different times to suite our community members from all over the world!

Join us June 1st at…

9am CEST/ 5pm AEST
Or
5pm CEST/ 11am EST

The power of monday AI (1)1920×1920 114 KB

**

posts.author: pamela.carlin (MrsFrink)
posts.cookedHtml: How can we register to attend? Do you have a registration link for those event times?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes! The times are linked!
Click the links below for the time that works best! Hope to see you there!

9am CEST/ 5pm AEST → (Meeting Registration - Zoom)

5pm CEST/ 11am EST → (Meeting Registration - Zoom)

posts.author: rbabayoff (Ronen Babayoff @ Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Julietteb , clicking on the links gets me an invalid meeting id error, see here.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Edited them! Thanks for highlighting! New links below:

9am CEST/ 5pm AEST → (Meeting Registration - Zoom)

5pm CEST/ 11am EST → (Meeting Registration - Zoom)

posts.author: MaggieB (Maggie Boler)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a recorded version of this event available?

posts.author: pamela.carlin (MrsFrink)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, because the links were fixed 4 days later, I couldn’t attend @Julietteb.
